General.Name: Shanghai Jiaoda Withub Information Industrial Co Ltd
General.Description: Shanghai Jiaoda Withub Information Industrial Company Limited engages in development and provision of business application solutions and application software services in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Business Application Project and Application Software; and Sales of Products segments. The company develops and provides business application project services, including business solutions and application software, and data security products, as well as installation and maintenance services. In addition, it sells and distributes computers, electronic products, and accessories. Further, the company is involved in computer network and internet security integration, application software development, building intelligent system integration, and IT products sales agency. It focuses on medical care, intelligent elderly care, intelligent surveillance, e-politics, e-commerce, and other sectors. Shanghai Jiaoda Withub Information Industrial Company Limited was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Shui On Centre, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
